message:
test(widgets): add full widget gallery E2E test across 5 terminal configs (bd-1lg.13)

14 tests rendering every major widget type (Block, Paragraph, ProgressBar,
Sparkline, StatusLine, TextInput, Tree, Table, List, Tabs, CommandPalette,
Modal) across 5 terminal sizes (80x24 to 200x60) and 5 degradation levels.

Validates:
- Static rendering correctness (content assertions per widget)
- Zero-area safety (no panics)
- Composed dashboard layout
- Degradation level border rendering differences

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
